narrative:
Silvercreek 425 (precinct in Greene County) has 474 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.6 percentage points.
